items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - REFLEX 3.0
items.description:
Let your light shine with Reflex – a mirrored take on Burberry’s Lola bag. This limited-edition style features a reflective mirrored surface and chain strap, while floating Thomas Burberry Monogram hardware frames the silhouette. 
Item created for 3.0 humanoid avatar.

items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - GEM 3.0
items.description: Cut with a glistening jewel-like facade, Gem is a charismatic and confident virtual Lola bag that features a polished Thomas Burberry Monogram and coordinating chain strap.
